content: Tailwind CSS 4 gradient syntax: bg-gradient-to-* still works (backward compatible) but canonical v4 name is bg-linear-to-*. Use from-*, via-*, to-* for color stops. For hero-to-content gradient fade: hero section uses bg-linear-to-b from-hero-start to-white, next section starts with bg-white. Verified: project builds successfully with bg-gradient-to-br syntax in hero.tsx.
